mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_lecture
WHERE target = #{target}
SELECT lno, lecture_name AS lectureName, teacher, content, file_path AS filePath, target FROM tbl_lecture WHERE lno = #{lno}
SELECT vno, lno, v_title AS vTitle, file_path AS filePath, duration FROM tbl_lecture_video WHERE lno = #{lno} ORDER BY vno ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_lecture (lecture_name, teacher, content, file_path, target) VALUES (#{lectureName}, #{teacher}, #{content}, #{filePath}, #{target})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_lecture SET lecture_name = #{lectureName}, teacher = #{teacher}, content = #{content}, file_path = #{filePath}, target = #{target} WHERE lno = #{lno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_lecture_video (lno, v_title, file_path, duration) VALUES (#{lno}, #{vTitle}, #{filePath}, #{duration})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_lecture_video SET v_title = #{vTitle}, file_path = #{filePath}, duration = #{duration} WHERE vno = #{vno}
